diagrams.title: DFA for Strings Ending with 'ab'
diagrams.description: Shows a DFA that accepts strings over {a,b} that end with substring 'ab'
elements: Transitions: q0-a→q1, q0-b→q0, q1-a→q1, q1-b→q2, q2-a→q1, q2-b→q2
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how DFA tracks recent input to detect patterns

diagrams.title: NFA for Regular Expression a(bc)*a
diagrams.description: NFA accepting strings starting and ending with 'a' with zero or more 'bc' in between
elements: q4 on 'a' to accepting state q5
diagrams.purpose: Understand NFA construction from regular expressions

diagrams.title: Alphabet to Language Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows relationship: Symbols → Strings (Σ*) → Language (subset) → Regular Language
diagrams.purpose: Understand conceptual hierarchy in automata theory

diagrams.title: DFA State Transition Diagram Template
diagrams.description: Standard notation for finite automaton state diagrams
elements: Labeled arrow = Transition with input symbol
diagrams.purpose: Learn standard diagram notation used in automata

visuals.title: The Central Concepts Of Automata Theory
visuals.description: Visual diagram for the central concepts of automata theory
